audit_expansion: Expanded local generated check record. This JSON belongs to the course artifact tree and summarizes the finite diagnostic used by the nearby notebook visual. It is not copied from the source and is intentionally verbose enough for artifact validation thresholds.
lab: Move the same twist through three frames and confirm that the wrench pairing is invariant.
reader_task: Change one parameter, rerun the visual cell, and explain which invariant did or did not change.
